metadata.description: Central registry for agent plugins (MCPs, skills, commands, hooks).

plugins.name: agent-vdesktop
plugins.description: Microsoft Virtual Desktop management for Claude Code (native Windows + WSL). Create/delete/switch desktops, apply layouts (presets and custom percent splits, multi-monitor), launch Chrome/Terminal/VSCode into layout slots, pin apps across desktops.

plugins.name: agent-project-issues
plugins.description: MCP server for GitHub/GitLab issue management. Read/create/update tickets and add comments with automatic safety markers (ai-generated / ai-modified labels, #ai-generated comment prefix). Per-project permissions; falls back to read-only auto-discovery from the git remote when no config is present.

plugins.name: agent-worktree
plugins.description: MCP server for git worktree lifecycle management. Create/list/remove worktrees with branch handling, run per-project setup scripts on creation, and detect uncommitted changes before destructive operations.

plugins.name: agent-mcp-tester
plugins.description: E2E-tests MCP servers: LLM-driven sweeps that record repeatable test suites, plus a deterministic runner that replays them with zero LLM tokens.

plugins.name: agent-ecosystem-ticket-router
plugins.description: Triage, route, and close tickets across a project ecosystem using MCP tool descriptions

plugins.name: agent-serena-wrapper
plugins.description: Pairs the external Serena MCP server with a skill so Claude works with code through token-efficient semantic operations instead of reading whole files.

plugins.name: agent-autonomous-developer
plugins.description: Turns agent-project-issues tickets into draft pull requests for projects in any language (stack auto-detected). Ships three skills — dispatch (model-facing lane-aware entry point), orchestrate-tickets (fleet orchestrator, main-checkout lane), and process-ticket (end-to-end ticket pipeline, worktree lane) — backed by five subagents. Drives the agent-project-issues and agent-worktree MCPs.

plugins.name: agent-unity-wrapper
plugins.description: Pairs the external Unity MCP server with a skill so Claude can drive the Unity editor - inspecting scenes, GameObjects, and assets - through structured MCP operations instead of guessing project state.

plugins.name: agent-batch-reviewer
plugins.description: Reviews multiple open pull requests of a project in parallel. The batch-reviewer skill fans out one Codex-backed pr-reviewer subagent per PR — each in its own isolated worktree — and every reviewer posts its own verdict as a PR review comment; the orchestrator aggregates a batch report. Engages only for multi-PR batches, deferring single-PR/diff review to /review and /code-review. Drives the agent-project-issues MCP and the Codex plugin.

plugins.name: agent-claude-memory-gatekeeper
plugins.description: Intercepts Claude's memory-save process and redirects new memories into a review folder, so you can approve them before they are persisted and shared.

plugins.name: agent-chrome-wrapper
plugins.description: Provides an MCP that gives agents access to Chrome, starting a separate Chrome instance for each session.

plugins.name: agent-comfy
plugins.description: MCP server for driving ComfyUI - submit workflows, manage the prompt queue, and fetch generated images
